description: The 7-layer NIRVA OS stack. Each layer builds on the one below: you cannot have trustworthy Executive Intelligence (L5) without Integrity (L2) on top of clean Operations (L1). `domains` link to standards_kb taxonomy IDs; `controls` link to standards_kb control IDs.

layers.name: Operations
layers.th: การปฏิบัติการ
layers.purpose: Run the day-to-day: capture reality once, at the edge.

layers.name: Integrity
layers.th: ความซื่อตรง
layers.purpose: Make the captured reality verifiable and tamper-evident — trust by evidence, not by surveillance.

layers.name: Compliance
layers.th: การปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐาน
layers.purpose: Turn evidence into proven conformance across standards & law.

layers.name: Knowledge
layers.th: องค์ความรู้
layers.purpose: Decouple know-how from individuals — organizational memory that outlives staff.

layers.name: Executive Intelligence
layers.th: ปัญญาผู้บริหาร
layers.purpose: Give leaders a true, real-time picture and early warning — see around corners.

layers.name: Human Growth
layers.th: การเติบโตของคน
layers.purpose: Develop people with dignity — appreciation, learning, reflection.

layers.name: Collective Wisdom
layers.th: ปัญญารวมหมู่
layers.purpose: Compound learning across the organization — transfer, resolve, improve.

philosophy: NIRVA is built to increase transparency, trust, fairness; to reduce conflict, rework and loss; to preserve workers' dignity, transfer knowledge, help people grow, and let the organization improve without being hostage to any individual. It is NOT built to catch, surveil, control, or instill fear.
